name: File Read/Write
author: itz-mune
description: Read, write, create, delete and inspect files and folders with diff previews.
long_description: Gives RAGdoll full read/write access to your file system. Reads files into context, writes with atomic operations and automatic backups, patches targeted lines, deletes safely to the recycle bin, and shows a live diff or confirmation before any destructive change. Integrates with Universal File Access — use search_files first, then file_rw to act on the result.

config_fields.label: Default delete behavior
config_fields.help: Whether deleted files go to Recycle Bin/Trash or are permanently removed. Individual deletes can override this.

config_fields.label: Create backup before writing
config_fields.help: Saves a .ragdoll_backup copy before overwriting any file. Required for the undo feature.

config_fields.label: Max file read size (MB)
config_fields.help: Files larger than this will be truncated when read into context. Hard limit is 10 MB.

config_fields.label: Diff context lines
config_fields.help: Number of unchanged lines shown above and below each change in the diff. Same as git -U flag.

config_fields.label: Character-level diff highlighting
config_fields.help: Highlights the exact characters that changed within a line, not just the whole line.

actions.label: Clear all backup files
actions.description: Removes all .ragdoll_backup files created by this skill.
actions.confirm_message: This will delete all .ragdoll_backup files. You will not be able to undo recent file edits.

changelog.1.0.0: Initial release — read/write/patch/delete with diff previews, atomic writes, automatic backups, and undo support.
